summary: Completed frontend-only validation of Help & Tour system for Torado ERP. Tested 8 NEW hub tours + 3 regression pages. All NEW hub tours work perfectly with Joyride tooltips anchoring correctly to page elements. One regression page (Executive Home) has a tour definition issue (missing target element).

tour_definition_issues.issue: First step target [data-testid='executive-header'] does not exist on the page. Joyride overlay and spotlight appear but tooltip does not render.
tour_definition_issues.impact: Tour cannot start on Executive Home page
tour_definition_issues.suggested_fix: Update tour definition in /app/frontend/src/contexts/tour/tours/executive.js to use a valid data-testid that exists on the Executive Home page, or add the missing data-testid='executive-header' to the page component.

passed_tests: ✅ Help button correctly hidden on /login (public page)
✅ Help button visible on authenticated pages
✅ Help-tour popover opens on all tested pages
✅ Tour options found in popover for all tested pages
✅ Welcome modal opens for all tours
✅ Finance Reports Hub tour - Joyride tooltip anchored (spotlight: 1280x800)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Executive Home tour definition: The first step target [data-testid='executive-header'] does not exist on the /executive page. Either add this data-testid to the Executive Home page component, or update the tour definition in /app/frontend/src/contexts/tour/tours/executive.js (line 11) to use a valid target selector that exists on the page (e.g., one of the existing data-testids like 'sidebar', 'topnav-menu-toggle', or create a new wrapper element with 'executive-header').

regression_pages.error: First step target [data-testid='executive-header'] not found on page
